offer: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, inaccurate risk assessments cause inadequate coverage recommendations. We provide a streamlined risk assessment tool instead of manual risk assessment methods.
problem: Inaccurate risk assessments lead to inadequate coverage recommendations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers seeking solutions

Share insights in community forums for insurance brokers

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a demo video showcasing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
